proof: function[T0: FiniteGroup, T1](x0: MulAction[T0, T1], x1: T1) { T0.elements.filter(stabilizer[T0, T1](x0, x1).contains).unique = finite_stabilizer_elements[T0, T1](x0, x1) }[G, X](a, x)
function[T0: FiniteGroup, T1](x0: MulAction[T0, T1], x1: T1) { T0.elements.filter(stabilizer[T0, T1](x0, x1).contains).unique = finite_stabilizer_elements[T0, T1](x0, x1) }[G, X](a, x)
function[T0: FiniteGroup] { T0.elements.contains_every }[G]
function[T0](x0: List[T0]) { forall(x1: T0) { x1 ∈ x0 } = x0.contains_every }[G](G.elements)
function[T0](x0: T0 -> Bool) { not exists(k0: T0) { not x0(k0) } or not forall(x1: T0) { x0(x1) } }[G](G.elements.contains)
function[T0](x0: T0 -> Bool, x1: T0) { not forall(x2: T0) { x0(x2) } or x0(x1) }[G](G.elements.contains, g)
function[T0: FiniteGroup, T1](x0: MulAction[T0, T1], x1: T1) { T0.elements.filter(stabilizer[T0, T1](x0, x1).contains).unique = finite_stabilizer_elements[T0, T1](x0, x1) }[G, X](a, x)
function[T0: lib(group).Group](x0: lib(subgroup).Subgroup[T0]) { subgroup_constraint[T0](x0.contains) }[G](s)
function[T0: FiniteGroup](x0: List[T0]) { (x0.is_unique and subgroup_constraint[T0](x0.contains)) = FiniteSubgroup.constraint[T0](x0) }[G](finite_stabilizer_elements[G, X](a, x))

function[T0: FiniteGroup](x0: List[T0]) { not FiniteSubgroup.constraint[T0](x0) or exists(k0: FiniteSubgroup[T0]) { FiniteSubgroup.new[T0](x0) = Option.some[FiniteSubgroup[T0]](k0) } }[G](finite_stabilizer_elements[G, X](a, x))

function[T0: FiniteGroup, T1](x0: MulAction[T0, T1], x1: T1) { Option.some[FiniteSubgroup[T0]](finite_stabilizer[T0, T1](x0, x1)) = FiniteSubgroup.new[T0](finite_stabilizer_elements[T0, T1](x0, x1)) }[G, X](a, x)

function[T0: FiniteGroup](x0: FiniteSubgroup[T0], x1: List[T0]) { Option.some[FiniteSubgroup[T0]](x0) != FiniteSubgroup.new[T0](x1) or x0.elements = x1 }[G](finite_stabilizer[G, X](a, x), finite_stabilizer_elements[G, X](a, x))

goal: finite_stabilizer[G, X](a, x).contains(g) = stabilizer[G, X](a, x).contains(g)

proof: function[T0: FiniteGroup, T1](x0: MulAction[T0, T1], x1: T1, x2: T0) { x2 ∈ stabilizer[T0, T1](x0, x1) = x2 ∈ finite_stabilizer[T0, T1](x0, x1) }[G, X](a, x, g)

goal: a.act(g * (g.inverse * h), x) = a.act(g, a.act(g.inverse * h, x))
a.act(g, a.act(g.inverse * h, x)) = a.act(g, x)

proof: function[T0: lib(semigroup).Semigroup](x0: T0, x1: T0, x2: T0) { x0 * x1 * x2 = x0 * (x1 * x2) }[G](g, g.inverse, h)
function[T0: lib(group).Group](x0: T0) { x0 * x0.inverse = T0.1 }[G](g)
function[T0: lib(monoid).Monoid](x0: T0) { T0.1 * x0 = x0 }[G](h)

goal: a.act(g.inverse * h, x) = a.act(g.inverse, a.act(h, x))
a.act(g.inverse, a.act(h, x)) = a.act(g.inverse, a.act(g, x))
finite_left_coset_set(finite_stabilizer[G, X](a, x), g).contains(h) = (a.act(h, x) = a.act(g, x))
a.act(k, x) = a.act(g, x) = (a.act(k, x) = a.act(h, x))
finite_left_coset_set(finite_stabilizer[G, X](a, x), g).contains(k) = finite_left_coset_set(finite_stabilizer[G, X](a, x), h).contains(k)

proof: not forall(x0: G) { x0 ∈ finite_left_coset_set(finite_stabilizer[G, X](a, x), h) = x0 ∈ finite_left_coset_set(finite_stabilizer[G, X](a, x), g) } or a.act(g, x) != a.act(h, x)
let w0: G satisfy { w0 ∈ finite_left_coset_set(finite_stabilizer[G, X](a, x), g) != w0 ∈ finite_left_coset_set(finite_stabilizer[G, X](a, x), h) }

function[T0: FiniteGroup, T1](x0: MulAction[T0, T1], x1: T1, x2: T0, x3: T0) { x3 ∈ finite_left_coset_set[T0](finite_stabilizer[T0, T1](x0, x1), x2) = (x0.act(x2, x1) = x0.act(x3, x1)) }[G, X](a, x, h, w0)

function[T0: FiniteGroup, T1](x0: MulAction[T0, T1], x1: T1, x2: T0, x3: T0) { x3 ∈ finite_left_coset_set[T0](finite_stabilizer[T0, T1](x0, x1), x2) = (x0.act(x2, x1) = x0.act(x3, x1)) }[G, X](a, x, g, w0)

goal: finite_left_coset_set(finite_stabilizer[G, X](a, x), g).contains(h) = finite_left_coset_set(finite_stabilizer[G, X](a, x), h).contains(h)
finite_left_coset_set(finite_stabilizer[G, X](a, x), g).contains(h) = (a.act(h, x) = a.act(g, x))
